title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.286 - Inapplicability to certain out-of-state businesses
text:
190.286.  Inapplicability to certain out-of-state businesses. — The provisions of sections 190.270 to 190.285 shall not grant exemptions authorized by the facilitating business rapid response to state-declared disasters act to any out-of-state business performing work pursuant to a request for bid or request for proposal by a state agency or political subdivision.
(L. 2014 H.B. 1190)
